body:
## Rationale

Mario Duplantier has the **highest CTR in the current GSC dataset** — 'mario duplantier gear' at **25% CTR, pos 6.5** (4 impr, 1 click). This is exceptional engagement. More Gojira content compounds this authority and pushes position toward page 1.

**Content gap confirmed:** 'the-way-of-all-flesh-drum-setup' exists (2008). 'from-mars-to-sirius-drum-setup' exists (2005). But **L'Enfant Sauvage (2012) has no dedicated article** — and it's Gojira's most critically acclaimed album (Grammy nominated 2013, broke through to mainstream metal audiences).

**Gear era difference:** L'Enfant Sauvage = distinctly different setup from From Mars to Sirius. Mario switched to DW drums and Meinl Byzance cymbals for this period. New content angle, not cannibalization.

## Target queries
- 'mario duplantier drum setup l'enfant sauvage'
- 'gojira drum kit 2012'
- 'mario duplantier dw drums setup'
- 'gojira drummer gear meinl'

## Files to create
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add new entry with slug `lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup`
  - drummer: 'Mario Duplantier'
  - band: 'Gojira'
  - album: "L'Enfant Sauvage"
  - year: 2012
  - relatedDrummerSlug: 'mario-duplantier'
  - gear: DW Collector's Series maple kit, Meinl Byzance cymbals (Brilliant finish), DW 9000 pedals, Vic Firth American Classic 5B sticks
  - Content sections: From Mars to Sirius to L'Enfant Sauvage gear evolution, recording at Silvercord Studio, mainstream breakthrough with 'L'Enfant Sauvage' title track (Guitar World cover), Grammy nomination context
  - Min 400 words, ≥3 FAQ Q&A, ≥3 internal links (→ mario-duplantier profile, → from-mars-to-sirius article, → the-way-of-all-flesh article)
- `public/llms/articles/lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup.md` — AI citation markdown

## Quality gate
- ≥400 words of original content
- FAQPage schema via parent template (already on all articles)
- MusicAlbum + MusicGroup entity links (from #1454 template)
- Internal links: ≥3 (drummer profile + 2 related Gojira articles)
- Visible `<time datetime>` stamp (#1521 pattern)

## Verify
1. `grep 'lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` returns the new entry
2. Article renders at /articles/lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup with full content
3. Sitemap includes the URL (dynamic from albumArticles.js)
4. /llms/articles/lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup.md exists and is well-formed markdown
5. Google Rich Results Test shows Article + FAQPage schema

## Done
When /articles/lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup renders with ≥400 words and LLM file exists.
title: SEO: Gojira — L'Enfant Sauvage Mario Duplantier drum setup article (25% CTR GSC signal)
